title: Netherite-Client
description: Netherite-Client makes Minecraft feel smoother, cleaner, and faster without changing the vanilla gameplay.
body:
## 🚀 Performance & Bugfixes
**Sodium**, **Lithium**, **ScalableLux**, Entity Culling and more: Complete rewrite of the Minecraft engine for **the most performance**.
![FPS Boost Compared to Major Modpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ba3837c574dcfe1224ea90c86484ecec99e8416_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>💻Tested on these specs:</summary>
  
CPU: Intel Core i7 4810MQ @ 2.8Ghz
  
RAM: 16GB DDR3 2666Mhz (10GB Allocated)

512GB SSD SATA OCZ-ARC100 (34GB Free)

GPU1: Intel HD Graphics 4600 

GPU2: Nvidia Quadro K1100M 

Using AtlasOS 0.4.1 on Windows 10

On Laptop HP Zbook 15 G2

Using Lowest Settings possible in all tests.

</details>



## **🧩 Quality of Life**
> **In-Game Account Switcher**: swap Microsoft, Mojang or offline profiles on the fly!

> **Fast Loading**: jump back into worlds servers **instantly** after disconnects

> **HUD and Functions**: do you play pvp? then Keystrokes, cps counter and low fire will help! And that is just the beggining. 

> **Capes Support**: cape rendering from multiple providers—purely cosmetic
> **And many more!**

## **🎨 Visuals**

> **Faithful 64x** & extra resource packs and shaders: **sharper** blocks and items **without losing the vanilla look.**
> **GUI tweaks** for **cleaner button**, icons, and **simplified menus**

> **And many more!**

Over 70 **carefully chosen mods** work behind the scenes to give you a **rock-solid**, **lag-free** Minecraft—no gimmicks, **just quality.**


<details>
<summary>💎Credits and Donates</summary>

HUGE Thanks to AxolotlClient for many of the features.

</details>



<details>
<summary>✨Frequently Asked Questions</summary>

> Q: Are you going to update to the newest version?
> 
> A: **Yes**, as soon as most of the included mods support it.

> Q: Will you consider a forge release?
> 
> A: **I am open** to making a forge version, however, **only after i complete this one**.

> Q: ThErE aRe BeTtEr mOdPaCkS fOr OpTiMizAtIoN...
> 
> A: **This modpack is mainly focused on QoL**, if you want pure performance, **check out Simply Optimized.**.

> Q: What can we expect in the future?
> 
> A: Probably **more features, optimizations and support for older versions**.

> Q: Are you going to abandon this project like the last one?
> 
> A: **Definitely not**, **i have huge plans with this modpack**, i left curseforge because most of the modders left, due to how they treated them (and me) there.

> Q: Will you return to curseforge?
> 
> A: **Partly**, i'll just update this modpack there occasionally. 

</details>
